nodes.label: sanad-student-terms.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad app's Student view showing the Terms Bank (بنك المصطلحات) panel. Displays a full RTL Arabic interface with tab navigation (Student Dashboard, Study Materials×5, Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank×15, Cases Bank×6), a search bar with year filter, an 'Add Term' button, and three legal term cards (القضاء/Judiciary, التاجر/Merchant, الشورى/Shura) each with a definition, category tag (دستوري/Constitutional or تجاري/Commercial), source law reference, usage example, and a mastery-level badge ('مألوف' = Familiar). Footer confirms PWA mode and Saudi SME/lawyer audience.

nodes.label: Terms Bank Panel (بنك المصطلحات)
nodes.description: UI concept for the student legal terms bank: a searchable, filterable collection of legal terms the student curates, each showing definition, category tag, source law, usage example, and a spaced-repetition mastery level badge.

nodes.label: Legal Term Card Design
nodes.description: Card design pattern for a legal term entry: term name (bold, RTL), definition text, category/domain tag (e.g. دستوري, تجاري), linked source law with icon, quoted usage example, and a mastery-level badge in the top-right corner.
